mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post(thread_id, user_id, floor_no, content, status, created_at) VALUES(#{threadId}, #{userId}, #{floorNo}, #{content}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.thread_id = #{threadId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.floor_no ASC
SELECT MAX(floor_no) FROM forum_post WHERE thread_id = #{threadId}
